title: Mario Ríos Montt, Bishop and Brother of Genocidal General, Dies at 94
summary_full: In Guatemala, he led the Catholic Church’s human rights office. His brother, a dictator who took power in a coup, was convicted of crimes against humanity.
summary_public: In Guatemala, he led the Catholic Church’s human rights office. His brother, a dictator who took power in a coup, was convicted of crimes against humanity.
